title: Junior Business Development Manager at RERA Authorities

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at RERA Authorities
jsonLd.description:
RERA Authorities, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RERA Authorities:
RERA Authorities is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RERA Authorities!
